about: Cold-keyword code-comprehension tasks for the EXTERNAL target csap-roadkeeper-frontend@aws-global (Vue3/Quasar). Ground-truth + rubric captured from the 2026-07-22 real-LLM N=3 run so the SDK-path driver (bench/real/agent.js) reproduces the same protocol. Point runner.js at this file with BENCH_TASKS; point agent.js at the repo with BENCH_TARGET_REPO and the (current) wiki with BENCH_WIKI_CWD. Questions deliberately avoid internal symbol names so arm B is not rigged.

tasks.question: How does a user sign in to this web app — what happens from submitting the login form to being authenticated, and where is the login request sent?
rubric: password is RSA-OAEP encrypted client-side (encryptRSA / crypto.subtle) before sending — NOT plaintext
two-step: getPublicKey POST /api/v2/auth/enc/session (public key + session_id), then login POST /api/v2/auth/login
auth is cookie/session based (axios withCredentials: true, no client-held bearer token)
optional TOTP MFA path (mfa_challenge_token -> MfaDialog)
session continuity via 419+201403 token refresh interceptor

tasks.question: How does this app decide which page component to render for a given browser URL, and where is that URL-to-page mapping defined?
rubric: the URL-to-page mapping is the RouteRecordRaw[] table in src/router/routes.ts
router created with createWebHistory (HTML5 history mode) in src/router/index.ts
a global beforeEach guard applies auth/role redirects (can override the raw match)
unmatched URLs fall through to a catch-all NotFoundPage

tasks.question: How does the frontend talk to its backend — where is the server base URL configured, and how are requests authenticated across calls?
rubric: single axios instance (ApiWrapper) with baseURL from VITE_APP_BACKEND_URL
authentication is cookie-session via withCredentials: true (no Authorization/bearer header)
response interceptor: 419+201403 single-flight token refresh, 401/403 clear session + redirect

tasks.question: On the hazard-management screen, how does the page obtain its list of hazards from the server and hold that data for display?
rubric: page fetchAllHazards -> hazardStore.fetchAllHazards -> ApiService.getAllHazards GET /api/v2/hazards/all
returned rows held in a page-local tableRows ref (store does not cache the list)
pagination/count metadata flows through SearchStore
list screen is OverallHazardsListPage.vue at /hazards_list (map is OverallHazardsMapPage.vue)

tasks.question: How does the app handle an idle user or an expired login session?
rubric: client-side idle timer: 59-min warning / 60-min forced logout (useSessionTimeout), reset on each request
server-driven expiry in the axios response interceptor: 419+201403 single-flight refresh, replay queued requests
401/403 -> clear session and redirect to /

tasks.question: After a user logs in, where is their user, menu, and group information stored so that other pages can use it?
rubric: sessionStorage under csap_rk_* keys (csap_rk_userInfo AES-encrypted via crypto-js)
in-memory Pinia UserStore mirror populated on login
router beforeEach guard rehydrates the store from sessionStorage on refresh
no client-held bearer token — auth is the HTTP-only cookie
